created_note: This JSON records how the previous wrapper notebook and standalone pipeline script were merged.

combined_from.what_changed: Removed dependency on importing/running an external .py file; notebook now owns the run entrypoint.

combined_from.role_before: standalone pipeline script containing engine, audit, metrics, JSON writers, Claude handoff
combined_from.what_changed: Inlined the full pipeline code into the notebook's embedded pipeline cell.

input_priority: v40_4_phase1_replay_cases.json fallback if full log is absent

future_policy: If a notebook can reasonably contain the pipeline without becoming unmanageable, ship one self-contained notebook first. Only provide a .py module when reuse, package imports, or multi-file engineering is genuinely needed.
